title: The Gracie Allen Murder Case
writer: S.S. Van Dine, Nat Perrin, C. Gardner Sullivan
actors: Gracie Allen, Warren William, Ellen Drew
plot: The zany plot follows nitwit Gracie Allen trying to help master sleuth Philo Vance solve a murder. Allen's uncle fixes her up with Bill at a company picnic. When the two go out to a nightclub that night, Gracie inadvertently links...
